scope: Greenfield full-capability build: every primary GET list/detail resource is a stream, and every primary POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE mutation the engine dialect can express is a writes.json action. Sub-resource analytics endpoints, org/user/invite administration, folders, questions/blocks metadata endpoints, and webhook event/retry endpoints are excluded as out_of_scope (narrower admin/analytics surface, not core forms+submissions+webhooks+workspaces sync).

excluded.reason: single-form detail is already covered by the forms stream's list read; no incremental/detail-only field requires a separate stream
form-definition metadata sub-resource, not a syncable data object distinct from forms
form-builder question editing, not a reverse-ETL data mutation
form-builder block metadata, not a syncable data object
form-builder block editing, not a reverse-ETL data mutation
single-submission detail is already covered by the submissions stream's list read
aggregate analytics snapshot, not a syncable object stream
aggregate analytics snapshot, not a syncable object stream
aggregate analytics snapshot, not a syncable object stream
aggregate analytics snapshot, not a syncable object stream
aggregate analytics snapshot, not a syncable object stream
single-workspace detail is already covered by the workspaces stream's list read
workspace membership/settings mutation with no documented example body in this pass; deferred to a capability-expansion pass
deletes an entire workspace and its forms; out of scope for this build's write surface
Pro-only folder organization metadata, not core forms/submissions data
